daily.today_energy: Your intuition is hitting different today. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your internal GPS recalibrating. The universe is whispering something worth listening to.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's an invitation to be more vulnerable today. Real connection happens when you let people see the messy, authentic parts. That's your superpower.
daily.career: Your creative energy is amplified. This is the moment to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or approach a project from a totally fresh angle. Your perspective matters more than you think.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Prioritize things that feel nourishing—whether that's rest, movement that brings joy, or just listening to what you actually need instead of pushing through.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to lean into your intuitive gifts, Cancer. A shift toward authenticity is building—trust what your gut's been whispering. Creative projects and genuine connections are calling for your attention.
weekly.love: Vulnerability becomes your superpower this week. Whether you're single or coupled up, letting people see the real you opens doors. Someone's noticing your depth. Give yourself permission to be a little messy and human about it.
weekly.career: Your ideas have serious momentum right now. Don't dim your light or second-guess that brilliant thought you had. Leadership qualities are emerging naturally—step into them. Your intuition about what needs doing is spot-on.
weekly.health: Your nervous system is asking for gentleness this week. Prioritize rest like it's non-negotiable. Movement that feels nourishing (not punishing) will ground you. Listen when your body whispers; don't wait for it to shout.
